card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: 38 people on terror watchlist nabbed at southern border since Oct. 1
card.description: In the fiscal year 2022, which ended in September, US Customs Border Patrol caught 98 people whose names appeared on the terror watchlist trying enter the US illegally.

author.description: Border Czar for President Donald J. Trump
